info.description: Allows you to interact with routings. For example, you can find, create, update, and delete routings with routing steps, routing step groups, routing operation groups, and custom values.
info.title: Routing

get.summary: Finds a routing by plant, routing name, routing type, and routing version
get.description: This endpoint can be called to find a routing by search parameters. The required parameters are plant, routing name, and type. The version is optional. If a version is not present, the current routing version will be returned.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Plant for which request is executed

parameters.name: routing
parameters.description: Routing name

parameters.name: type
version
parameters.description: The version of the routing. If not present, the current routing version will be returned

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

post.description: Creates a list of routings for the given plant.

parameters.name: routingApiModelList
parameters.description: The list of routings to create.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

409.description: One of the routings already exists.

parameters.name: routingApiModelList
parameters.description: The list of routings to update.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

patch.summary: Update routing header details. Every unspecified field will remain unchanged
patch.description: This endpoint can be called to update a routing's header details.

routingType.description: The routing type of the routing.

technicalMessage.description: Contains technical reason for the error.

timestamp.description: The time when the error message is created.

code.description: Contains a technical code for the error.

causeMessage.description: Contains a technical reason for the error.

correlationId.description: Contains a correlation ID for the error.

unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure of the quantity.

plant.description: The plant this routing is assigned to.

routingType.description: Indicates the type of routing that is being used.

currentVersion.description: If true, this version of the routing is the current one.

entryRoutingStepId.description: The entry routing step for the routing.

quantityValidation.description: Indicates if quantity validation is required during production.

relaxedFlow.description: Indicates if the routing has a relaxed flow. By default, this value is false.

automaticGoodsReceipt.description: Indicates if the routing is configured for an automatic goods receipt.

routingErpSequences.description: The routing step sequences of the routing.

routingOperationGroups.description: The operation groups of the routing.

routingSteps.description: The routing steps in the routing.

createdDateTime.description: The time when the routing was created.

modifiedDateTime.description: The time when the routing has most recently changed.

plant.description: The plant this routing is assigned to.

routingType.description: Indicates the type of routing that is being used.

currentVersion.description: If true, this version of the routing is the current one.

entryRoutingStepId.description: The entry routing step for the routing.

quantityValidation.description: Indicates if quantity validation is required during production.

relaxedFlow.description: Indicates if the routing has a relaxed flow. By default, this value is false.

automaticGoodsReceipt.description: Indicates if the routing is configured for an automatic goods receipt.

routingErpSequences.description: The routing step sequences of the routing.

routingOperationGroups.description: The operation groups of the routing.

routingSteps.description: The routing steps in the routing.

createdDateTime.description: The time when the routing was created.

modifiedDateTime.description: The time when the routing has most recently changed.

description.description: The description of the ERP routing sequence.

referenceSequence.description: The ID of the ERP sequence to which the ERP sequence refers.

branchOperation.description: The ID of the branch operation.

returnOperation.description: The ID of the return operation.

router.description: The routing the link refers to.

routingStep.description: The routing step the link refers to.

routingOperationGroup.description: The name of the routing operation group.

description.description: The description of the routing operation group.

routingOperationGroupSteps.description: The steps of the routing operation group.

baseQuantity.description: Base quantity of the routing operation step.

maxLoop.description: Limits how many times an SFC may be restarted. If 0, then there is no limit.

operationActivity.description: The operation to be performed at the routing step.

stepType.description: The type of routing operation step.

weighRelevant.description: Indicates if the operation is weight relevant.

automaticGoodsReceipt.description: Indicates if the operation is configured for an automatic goods receipt.

erpServiceActivityType.description: Indicates the activity type used to execute a service order in SAP ERP.

serviceWork.description: Indicates the work needed to perform a requested service.

serviceWorkUnit.description: Indicates the unit of measure for service work.

serviceDuration.description: Indicates the amount of time needed to perform a requested service.

serviceDurationUnit.description: Indicates the unit of measure for a service duration.

numberOfServiceCapacities.description: Indicates the number of service capacities needed to execute a service order.

longText.description: The long text field contains General information about the routing operation step.

customValues.description: Custom data for the routing operation step.

operation.description: The operation to return the SFC to (if valid on the original router).

sfcStatus.description: The status applied to a scrapped SFC (when the entire SFC quantity is scrapped).

scrapAll.description: Determines whether the option to scrap the parent and the child SFC components is available.

scrapParent.description: Determines whether the option to scrap the parent while leaving the components intact is available.

scrapAndReturnComp.description: Determines whether the option to scrap the parent and remove and return the child SFC components to inventory is available.

description.description: The description of the routing step.

entry.description: If true, this is an entry routing step.

nextStepList.description: The list of the next possible routing steps.

productionProcessId.description: The ID of the production process.

routingLink.description: The routing link associated with the routing step.

routingOperation.description: The operation to be performed at the routing step.

routingStepGroup.description: The routing step group for simultaneous and any-order groups.

stepId.description: The step ID of the routing step. It should be either from 1 to 4 digits long, or follow one of the following formats: '1234-1234' or 'x(1 to 6 chars)-1234-1234'.

sequence.description: The sequence of the routing step.

workCenter.description: The work center for the routing step.

reportingStep.description: Indicates how this step is known in an external system.

erpSequence.description: The routing step sequence in ERP external system.

controlKey.description: The control key for the routing step.

lastReportingStep.description: Indicates if it is the last reporting step (by default it is set to 'true' for steps without any next steps, provided no other steps in the routing have this set to 'true.').

rework.description: Indicates if this step is considered as rework.

queueDecisionType.description: This determines who decides where an SFC should be placed in queue when completing this step.

routingStepComponentList.description: The list of components to be assembled at this step.

description.description: The description of the routing step.

entry.description: If true, this is an entry routing step.

nextStepList.description: The list of the next possible routing steps.

productionProcessId.description: The ID of the production process.

routingLink.description: The routing link associated with the routing step.

routingOperation.description: The operation to be performed at the routing step.

routingStepGroup.description: The routing step group for simultaneous and any-order groups.

sequence.description: The sequence of the routing step.

workCenter.description: The work center for the routing step.

reportingStep.description: Indicates how this step is known in an external system.

erpSequenceCategory.description: The ERP sequence category (a value is available for routings with multiple sequences).

controlKey.description: The control key for the routing step.

lastReportingStep.description: Indicates if it is the last reporting step (by default it is set to 'true' for steps without any next steps, provided no other steps in the routing have this set to 'true.').

rework.description: Indicates if this step is considered as rework.

queueDecisionType.description: This determines who decides where an SFC should be placed in queue when completing this step.

routingStepComponentList.description: The list of components to be assembled at this step.

sequence.description: Controls the order of display and execution of the component.

quantity.description: The number of pieces of the component to be assembled at this step.

sequence.description: The order the component is displayed in relation to other BOM components.

plant.description: The plant for which the BOM is defined.

workCenter.description: The name of the work center.

routingStepGroupType.description: The type of router step group.

routingStepGroupStepList.description: The list of routing step groups.

sequence.description: Controls the order the steps are controlled within the group.

successors.description: A comma-delimited list of next step successors for this particular step group member.

currentVersion.description: If true, the version of the routing is current.

relaxedFlow.description: Indicates if the routing is a relaxed flow routing.
